data.title: KULR Technology Stock Is Up 70% Over The Past Week: What's Going On?
data.description: KULR Technology Group shares are up roughly 72% over the last five sessions. The company last week was awarded a contract by the U.S. Navy.

data.title: Zuckerberg Seeks 'Active Role' In Trump's Tech Policies, Says Top Executive — Admits Meta 'Overdid It' During Pandemic Content Crackdown
data.description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg is aiming to play an active role in shaping U.S. technology policies under President-elect Donald Trump, while the company also works to refine its content moderation practices and continues to outperform financial expectations.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Power Down Amid South Korea Political Turmoil: Analyst Shares Strategy For Altcoin Holders — Avoid Chasing FOMO, Take Profits
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies traded flat Tuesday even as the stock market closed at new records.

data.title: Palantir, Salesforce, Okta, Meta, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: The U.S. stock markets were mixed on Tuesday, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 70 points.

data.title: South Korean Markets Plunge Amid Political Turmoil As President Yoon's Martial Law U-Turn Sparks Uncertainty: Samsung, SK Hynix, And Hyundai Stocks Tumble
data.description: South Korean markets traded sharply lower on Wednesday, Dec. 3, 2024 following a dramatic political upheaval that saw President Yoon Suk Yeol briefly impose and then quickly withdraw martial law after facing parliamentary opposition.
